prompt:
A bookstore initially purchased 200 copies of a new novel for $12.50 each.
They sold 60% of these copies at a 40% markup on the purchase price.
Later, they decided to put the remaining copies on sale, offering a 25% discount on the *original selling price*.
During the sale, they only managed to sell half of the remaining copies.
What was the bookstore's total profit from the sales of this novel, rounded to the nearest cent?
